2.label: On/Off
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off when the sensor is opened or closed (uses Basic command class).

3.label: Tamper
3.description: Devices in this group will receive notifications when tampering is detected.

paramInformation.label: Door/Window State
paramInformation.description: State of the door/window when the magnet is close to the sensor

paramInformation.label: Visual LED Indications: Opening/Closing Status Change
2nd Association Group Triggers
paramInformation.description: Events which result in sending on/off commands to devices added to the 2nd association group

paramInformation.label: Association for Opening: Value Sent
paramInformation.description: Value sent to devices in 2nd association group when opening is detected. Values 1-99 set an associated device to a specified level.

paramInformation.label: Association for Closing: Value Sent
paramInformation.description: Value sent to devices in 2nd association group when closing is detected. Values 1-99 set an associated device to a specified level.

paramInformation.label: Association for Opening: Time Delay
paramInformation.description: Time that must elapse from opening to send the command frame to devices in 2nd association group

paramInformation.label: Association for Closing: Time Delay
paramInformation.description: Time that must elapse from closing to send the command frame to devices in 2nd association group

paramInformation.label: Tamper: Alarm Cancellation Delay
paramInformation.description: Time period after which a tamper alarm will be cancelled

paramInformation.label: Tamper: Reporting Alarm Cancellation
paramInformation.description: Reporting cancellation of tamper alarm to the controller and 3rd association group

options.label: Do not send tamper cancellation report

paramInformation.label: Temperature Reports Threshold
paramInformation.description: Change of temperature in comparison with last reported, resulting in temperature report being sent

paramInformation.label: Temperature Offset
paramInformation.description: The value to be added to the actual temperature, measured by the sensor

paramInformation.label: Temperature Alarm Reports
paramInformation.description: Temperature alarms reported to the Z-Wave controller. Thresholds are set in parameters 55 and 56.

options.label: High and low temperature alarms enabled

metadata.inclusion: Quickly, three times press one of the TMP buttons while holding the other button.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly, three times press one of the TMP buttons while holding the other button.
metadata.reset:
1. Open the cover.
2. Remove the battery.
3. Install the battery while holding both TMP buttons.
4. The LED indicator flashes slowly for 5 seconds. Keep holding the buttons.
5. Release one button when the LED indicator starts flashing quickly.
6. Click the released button once to confirm.
7. Do not remove the battery until the LED indicator gives a long blink.
8. The LED indicator blinks 5 times quickly to confirm the reset.
